name: O-3 plugin lifecycle: uninstall-cleanup --category cache --confirm yes removes the cache directory
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/cache && printf 'x\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/cache/y.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/uninstall-cleanup.sh" --category cache --confirm yes 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ ! -e .claude-tdd-pro/cache ] && grep -q 'removed' err.txt && echo removed 1>&2
